title: Add cockpit to main dashboard sitenav

log.context: Add cockpit to main dashboard sitenav

All three cockpit references are in place. Since `index.html` is served as a static file from disk (no compilation needed), no clunger restart is required for this change. The cockpit route was already confirmed working at `/cockpit` in `clunger/src/index.ts`.
